xsl:when.test: count(../../image) > 1 and position()=2 and boolean(../../../../iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu/iaiext:item[ @id='857' or @id='858' or @id='517' or @id='1293' or @id='501' or @id='519' or @id='520' or @id='498' or @id='502' or @id='1165'])

count(../../image) = 1 or (position()=1 and not(../../../../iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu/iaiext:item[ @id='857' or @id='858' or @id='517' or @id='1293' or @id='501' or @id='519' or @id='520' or @id='498' or @id='502' or @id='1165']))

xsl:if.test: parameters/parameter[@hide = 'n' and @distinction = 'y' and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($gender_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($age_group_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($klasa_energetyczna_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($kolor_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($material_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($waga_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) and not(contains($pojemnosc_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) ]/@name

xsl:variable.name: detail_get
xsl:variable.select: parameters/parameter[@hide = 'n' and @distinction = 'y' and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($gender_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($age_group_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($klasa_energetyczna_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($kolor_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($material_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($waga_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) and not(contains($pojemnosc_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) ]/@name

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!=''

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
